name: P31 home alignment registry
ephemeralization: One canonical source per concern; generate or verify downstream artefacts. No parallel lore. A change in a source is intentionally coupled to its sinks: CI and this file tell you which command heals or proves alignment.

sources.role: Operator-locked numbers, mission snippet, ground-truth version/schema pins, mesh URLs

verifyPipeline.description: Root `package.json` `verify` = prelude + scripts in order (incl. verify:runbooks for docs/runbooks/README.md links; verify:delta-language for DELTA lexicon JSON + hub mirror). verify:p31ca-contracts chains build:fleet-entities → verify:fleet-entities → verify:ground-truth → verify:worker-spa-launch → education → … verify:starfield syncs design-assets/starfield → p31ca public/lib; verify:fleet-ten checks scripts/p31-fleet-ten bundle; verify:ollama-mcp + verify:ollama-tunnel-config gate Cursor Ollama bridges; verify:github-org validates docs/github-org-bundle/repos-metadata.json. Update this file whenever `verify` changes.
verifyPipeline.preludeNote: Fast guard (verify-alignment.mjs): JSON + required sources. Skipped in the `--verify` loop (prelude already satisfied).
